introSection: Goliath is a steel hyper roller coaster located at Six Flags Over Georgia in Austell, Georgia, USA. Opened in 2006, the ride is the third in the Six Flags chain to be called "Goliath". It was manufactured by Bolliger & Mabillard.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Goliath was officially announced on September 1, 2005. Both the Great Gasp and Looping Starship flat rides were removed that year to make way for the new ride.

The ride officially opened to the general public on April 1, 2006.

A repaint for the ride was announced on August 17, 2024. The repaint was performed by Baynum Solutions.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 9 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 36 riders per train.

fullText:
Goliath is a steel hyper roller coaster located at Six Flags Over Georgia in Austell, Georgia, USA. Opened in 2006, the ride is the third in the Six Flags chain to be called "Goliath". It was manufactured by Bolliger & Mabillard.

Goliath was officially announced on September 1, 2005. Both the Great Gasp and Looping Starship flat rides were removed that year to make way for the new ride.

The ride officially opened to the general public on April 1, 2006.

A repaint for the ride was announced on August 17, 2024. The repaint was performed by Baynum Solutions.



2 trains with 9 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 36 riders per train.
